mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the unemployment rate signals improving labor market conditions and rising consumer spending power, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in > 55% of triggered instances over a 3-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate broad-based consumer demand expansion, which translates to higher corporate earnings expectations and positive 20-day equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive changes in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce positive forward returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation expectations during a period of near-zero policy rates trigger fears of delayed monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and generating negative short-term returns.
failure_condition: Positive CPIAUCSL growth does not lead to negative 5-day returns in > 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Higher industrial production levels reflect stronger manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which directly supports corporate revenue growth and yields positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll gain exceeding 200,000 signals robust economic momentum and wage growth, boosting consumer confidence and driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in > 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid GDP growth combined with accelerating inflation creates stagflationary risks that force markets to price in tighter financial conditions, resulting in negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint high GDPC1 growth and CPIAUCSL acceleration fail to predict negative returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Persistently high unemployment above 8% signals weak aggregate demand and sluggish corporate earnings growth, leading to negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Negative signal fails to produce negative 5-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances.
